title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.714 - Transfer of all-terrain vehicle, new owner to register
text:
301.714.  Transfer of all-terrain vehicle, new owner to register. — Upon the transfer of ownership of any currently registered all-terrain vehicle, the certificate of registration and decal shall expire and it shall be unlawful for any person other than the person to whom such certificate of registration and decal were originally issued to have such certificate of registration or decal in his possession, unless such person has made application to the department of revenue in his name and paid the registration fee.
(L. 1988 H.B. 990 § 8) 
Effective 1-01-89
